label: set-of (the sort former Set)
gloss: the sort former Set(s): collections of individuals of sort s, with extensional identity (ax-set-extensionality-nat).
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: KIND (relational-substantive prime) classifies by likeness, not by extensional collection; no honest bridge.
